name: config-evolve
description: Suggests additive changes to your Claude Code config based on how you actually work. Runs the same on demand (/config-evolve) or monthly (a scheduled claude -p run): it analyzes your recent usage and current config, then proposes a ranked set of improvements (a new skill, a CLAUDE.md rule, a hook, a permission allowlist entry, a saved slash command, an MCP server, or a settings tweak), each drafted ready to apply. Writes a dated review doc, never auto-applies, offers a guided apply for approved items with backups, and remembers past decisions so it never re-suggests what you rejected. Self-contained; complements setup-audit by focusing on what to add.
